title: EVENTS - 211info
text: TRANSPONDER EVENTS Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides mutual support meetings, social and special events. 440 Maxwell Road Eugene, OR 97404 Eligibility: Transgender and gender-diverse individuals and their allies Hours: Varies by event Email (541) 321-0872 Get Directions Visit Website Phone/FAX Numbers Main phone (541) 321-0872 Email Address: [email protected] INTAKE PROCEDURE: Visit website FEES: None DOCUMENTS: None AREA SERVED: Cities of Eugene and Springfield TRAVEL/LOCATION INFORMATION: Located on the third floor, across from the elevator and at the top of the stairs. Services: LGBTQ2+ Social Clubs LGBTQ2+ Support Groups Other Services Offered At This Location: FOOD - FOOD FOR LANE COUNTY FOOD PROGRAM INFORMATION SERVICES - RESOURCE NAVIGATOR SPECIALIZED TREATMENT AND PREVENTION - HIV ALLIANCE INJECTION SUPPLY DELIVERY PROGRAM If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge. However, you should always call the provider to confirm this information and make an appointment. Be sure to confirm payment information with the provider, if payment is required. 211Info does not rate, recommend or endorse any agency. We simply provide information as a public service.
